$comment: D-CSUBSET-FN-PROTOTYPE: a bare function prototype (`int is_odd(int n);`) MERGES with a later definition, enabling forward/mutual recursion (is_even forward-calls is_odd). Value-divergent: is_even(10)=1, is_odd(7)=1, is_even(4)=1 -> exit 42. RED-ON-DISABLE: restore the Pass-1.5 S_InvalidFunctionDeclarator rejection of the prototype -> the program no longer COMPILES (the runner reports a compile failure, not exit 42). The release arm re-witnesses under the shipped pipeline (two ordinary mutually-recursive functions; no proto node survives lowering).
